response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to agentic workflows at re:cinq, but lacks clear evidence of leading multi-agent AI systems at scale in regulated fintech environments, managing teams beyond 10 people, or designing real-time credit/risk systems — critical for this CTO role.
strengths: Hands-on experience with agentic workflows and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Proven track record in distributed systems, event-driven architecture, and real-time data handling
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership in diverse domains
concerns: No demonstrable experience in fintech infrastructure, credit risk, or regulatory compliance
Lack of evidence scaling engineering teams to 30+ or building senior technical leadership layers
No clear record of architecting model-agnostic, auditable AI systems with feedback loops in production
